Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Plaintiffs Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities (Motions)
Off Calendar Dec-29-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT MA COW HOLLOW, LLC, JUSTIN BROWN, and TANYA BROWN's Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Plaintiffs Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiffs filed a notice of non-opposition. Accordingly, Defendants' motion to compel arbitration of Plaintiffs' complaint is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
